textByHash.4492904b535f4dd9dba8a71efaf0fc8da05946c4: General Hining sent us out in a scouting party. We got separated from the rest, and became completely lost. Soon we ran out of rations.
textByHash.68cab35ad6d12dbafd324955dd97c628ea9018ca: It's probably the sacred eels that did it. They change you, you know. Once you've tasted them, you're part of the tribe forever.
textByHash.721ccce50507ca77978de15bbbc57513abcf7d31: It's not often that we see more humans in this place.
textByHash.748f524fa76e4ddda249f31680e785db2c4a4551: Eventually we stumbled upon this place. They saw we were starving, and allowed us to eat of their sacred eels if we vowed to serve Zulrah.
textByHash.aa662a48e7bb34edc81ff281774663b572c014f1: Since then, we've settled here. We went back up north once, to see how the king's campaign was going, but they drove us out of the camp, calling us unclean.
